productDisplayName: Basics Men Red Slim Fit Striped Shirt
description: Composition Red shirt with white stripes, made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, spread collar, buttoned front placket, patch pocket on the upper left chest with a buttoned flap, brand tab on the placket, stitch detailing on the collar and cuffs, and a curved hemline Fitting Slim Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach Hang dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on print or embroidery The white stripes and cleverly mitired pocket on the upper left chest adds rugged styling to this red shirt from basics, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling comfortable all day. Team it with jeans and sneakers. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 5'11' and shoulders 17.5"
